parameters.prompt: Original photorealistic sealed-duty near-future sidearm, 31 cm long, plausible bore axis, compact upper receiver and barrel group, removable grip magazine, protected trigger, ambidextrous selector, low-profile sight module, service takedown seams and gloved-hand ergonomics. upper receiver, frame, magazine, trigger and selector boundaries remain readable
compact sealed-duty silhouette fits the shared Helix material language
conditions: upper receiver, frame, barrel group, magazine, trigger, selector and sight become separate rigid parts
authored 0.31 m envelope, grip ergonomics, sight line and muzzle axis remain authoritative
